primary_reference.citation: Morton, Baase & Matthews 1995, alkylbenzene binding to the T4 lysozyme L99A cavity.

note: Report effect.direction (stronger_binding for n-butylbenzene vs benzene) and use submitted short comparative MD metrics (ligand-cavity contacts, buried hydrophobic surface, ligand occupancy/retention) as consistency evidence. Do not claim that short MD alone yields a quantitative binding delta-delta-G.
